---
title: "Mathematical Aspects of Data Science Summer School (EFPL)"
date: "2025-09-01"
categories: [News, Workshops]
description: "Attended the summer school at EFPL and presented a poster."
---
Attended the Mathematical Aspects of Data Science Summer School at EFPL in Lausanne, Switzerland. I also presented a poster titled: *Computing Empirical Barycenters on Unknown Wasserstein Submanifolds*.
